vocab.meaning: một kho tàng kiến thức đồ sộ
vocab.example: Wikipedia is essentially a wealth of knowledge where I can dive deep into any subject from quantum physics to ancient history.

vocab.meaning: hiểu rõ cái gì đó đến tận chân tơ kẽ tóc
vocab.example: I’ve used this coding website so often that I now know its documentation and shortcuts inside out.

vocab.meaning: theo kịp, giữ tốc độ cùng với
vocab.example: I visit TechCrunch daily to keep pace with the rapid developments and breakthroughs in the Silicon Valley ecosystem.

vocab.meaning: phần cộng thêm khiến mọi thứ trở nên hoàn hảo hơn
vocab.example: The site provides great tutorials, and the fact that they offer free certifications is really the icing on the cake.

vocab.meaning: có sẵn ngay lập tức, trong tầm tay
vocab.example: Having a vast library of sheet music at my fingertips on this website has revolutionized the way I practice the piano.

vocab.meaning: đi thẳng vào vấn đề (không rườm rà)
vocab.example: I prefer websites that cut to the chase and provide direct answers rather than burying information under piles of advertisements.

vocab.meaning: một làn gió mới (sự thay đổi dễ chịu)
vocab.example: Finding a website with no pop-up ads and a clean design was a real breath of fresh air compared to most modern blogs.

vocab.meaning: điều gì đó gợi suy nghĩ, đáng để suy ngẫm
vocab.example: The opinion pieces on The Guardian always provide me with plenty of food for thought regarding global socio-political issues.

vocab.meaning: tốt nhất, không ai sánh kịp
vocab.example: When it comes to user experience and interface design, the aesthetics of this portfolio site are second to none.

vocab.word: hit the nail on the head
vocab.meaning: nói đúng trọng tâm, chẩn đoán chính xác
vocab.example: This movie review site always hits the nail on the head when describing the strengths and weaknesses of new releases.
